# templating

Pure, dependency-free templating helpers shared by workflow step executors.
`getByPath(obj, path)` reads a dot-path into a value (an empty path or a
non-object resolves to `undefined`); `interpolate(template, input)` renders a
string by replacing every `{{ expr }}` token with a stringified value, where
`{{ . }}` is the whole `input` and `{{ a.b }}` is a dot-path into it
(`undefined`/`null` → empty string, objects/arrays → JSON, everything else →
`String`). A core-only leaf library — no web or server runtime.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Templating helpers for workflow step executors: dot-path access and {{ expr }} interpolation over a step's input.
- Core:
  - Exports: Values: `getByPath`, `interpolate`
